notes:
NovaPanel v0.6.54

- Fix: before-quit no longer calls event.preventDefault() when _forceQuitCalled — update quit now exits Electron immediately without waiting for async cleanup.
- Fix: SensorBridge.exe force-killed via taskkill /F in update shutdown path — graceful .stop() with unref'd timer was not guaranteeing process termination.
- Fix: BrowserWindow.getAllWindows().forEach(w => w.destroy()) added as belt-and-suspenders alongside named window references.
- Fix: app.exit(0) fallback reduced from 3000ms to 1500ms.
- All required shutdown logs present: update shutdown start, SensorBridge stopped, tray destroyed, windows destroyed, app quit called, app exit forced.
